channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Salad praise: how ice hockey’s ‘lettuce’ hair is winning over Hollywood
item.description: Gentler take on mullet has flowed over shoulders at Winter Olympics and is now tossed on red carpets Hair cut ideas are typically drummed up in the sa...

item.title: Don’t be fooled by recent good news, the UK economy is still in a precarious state
item.description: Labour MPs may clamour for bolder spending, but – like their Tory and Reform counterparts – they ask for the unaffordable Too many Labour MPs want it ...

item.title: US lawmakers seek release of double amputee from Georgia ICE detention
item.description: Congress members write to Kristi Noem to express ‘grave concern’ over detention of Georgia barber Rodney Taylor Representative Pramila Jayapal and 20 ...

item.title: Combative Carlson-Huckabee interview reveals US right’s chasm over Israel
item.description: Parts of Maga view Israel with suspicion, but US ambassador continues to believe in its divine right to much of the Middle East Parts of the Maga righ...

item.title: Iran refusing to export highly enriched uranium but willing to dilute purity
item.description: Proposal will be at heart of offer to US as Trump considers whether to attack Iran Iran is refusing to export its 300kg stockpile of highly enriched u...

item.title: Italian toddler dies after transplant with heart 'burned by frostbite'
item.description: The heart given to two-year-old Domenico was reportedly severely damaged during its transfer to hospital.

item.title: Third man arrested after teens die at holiday park
item.description: Ethan Slater, 17, and Cherish Bean, 15, died at a holiday park near Bridlington on Wednesday.

item.title: UK should send non-combat troops to Ukraine now, former PM Johnson tells BBC
item.description: Troops should be deployed to peaceful parts of the country in non-fighting roles, he said.

item.title: MPs to discuss inquiry into trade envoy role after Andrew arrest
item.description: A cross-party committee will also look into the appointment and accountability of UK trade envoys.

item.title: Israeli strikes kill at least 10 in Lebanon, officials say
item.description: The strikes are among the deadliest in Lebanon since a ceasefire ended the war between Israel and Hezbollah.
